g.aria-label:
region FLASH { addr = 0x8000; size = 4096; }
section A { wr8 0xAA, 1024; } // Fill with 0xAA section B { wr8 0xBB, 1024; } // Fill with 0xBB section C { set_addr(0xF000); wr8 0xCC, 1024; } // New Addr! section D in FLASH { assert sizeof(D) == 4096; wr64 addr(C); // Pointer to relocatable section C wr64 sizeof(C); // Size of relocatable section C pad_sec_offset 512; // Add padding to offset 512 wr A; // Write section A wr B; // Write section B pad_sec_offset 3072; // Add padding to offset 3072 wr C; // Write relocatable section C } output D; // Initial address is 0x8000
